name: Dr. Andreas Vogel
employment_history:
Senior Manager (January 2020 → Present)
Responsible for M&A projects in the energy sector with transaction volumes over 500 million EUR. Led teams of up to 12 consultants on international projects. Developed a new practice initiative in sustainability and energy transition

Manager (January 2017 → December 2019)
Managed strategy and performance improvement projects in the energy industry. Developed new business models for utilities transitioning to renewable energies

Senior Consultant (April 2014 → December 2016)
Worked on strategy projects in industrial goods and mechanical engineering. Post-merger integration for a DAX corporation

Consultant (September 2011 → March 2014)
Participated in performance improvement projects in the automotive industry
education:
RWTH Aachen — Doctorate (Dr. rer. pol.)
Karlsruhe Institute of Technology (KIT) — Diplom-Wirtschaftsingenieur
functional_expertise: M&A, Strategy, Performance Improvement, Sustainability, Energy Transition
methods: Lean Six Sigma, Balanced Scorecard, OKR
tools: Microsoft Excel, Microsoft PowerPoint, think-cell, Tableau, SAP
certifications: Lean Six Sigma Black Belt (2018), PRINCE2 Practitioner (2015)
